title: ConvertKit vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ConvertKit vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ConvertKit and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ConvertKit wins for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
